channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Light has been out for almost two months, 12th April
item.description:
This is the third time I am reporting this. It hasn’t been fixed but my previous report was incorrectly marked as fixed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walnut Close, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No signage for right of way, 11th April
item.description:
From the edge of Coombe hill nature reserve to Blacksmith lane there’s no signs for the footpath despite there being one on the way in(from the canal area) so it’s extremely difficult to walk there responsibly as we don’t want to go off track in/around the nature reserve or into private property.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leigh, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting still not working, 11th April
item.description:
100 beeches road gl53 8nx

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 102, Beeches Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large, deep pothole on Aggs Hill causing vehicle damage – hazardous near bend, 11th April
item.description:
A large and deep pothole is present on Aggs Hill, Cheltenham, on the uphill section just before the sharp left-hand bend near Lower Hewletts Farm (approx. coordinates 51.898985, -2.035868). The defect is deeper than a golf ball and wider than a dinner plate, located within the carriageway in a position that vehicles cannot safely avoid, particularly when travelling uphill towards the bend. The pothole appears to have been present for some time and the surrounding road surface is breaking up, indicating deterioration rather than a sudden defect. There are also multiple similar reports in the immediate area, suggesting this is a known and ongoing issue. This defect presents a clear hazard to road users and has already caused damage to a vehicle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aggs Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big sign is broken missing information about the roundabout up ahead., 11th April
item.description:
Not safe to take a photo but the sign showing he road layout and roundabout information is missing. The top half of the signage is missing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tripping Hazard, 11th April
item.description:
At the end of Denbigh Road, unstable wall, with plastic barriers, either side off, which keep falling/blowing over on aweekly basis, obstructing alleyway path, used by school Children/Oap's etc, these plastic barriers have been up about year, if this wall needs plastic barriers for safety, when is it going to be repaired, or isn't it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Denbigh Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Trees have not been pruned since 2008 -now massive, 11th April
item.description:
Trees now overhang the complete garden and property, breaking roof tiles, blocking out light (when in leaf) and causing damage - trees need to be brought under control and have the canopy much reduced in size.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 84, All Saints' Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Collapsed fencing onto highway, 11th April
item.description:
Fencing panels next to 9a Millbrook have. come away from posts. It protects people from accessing the bank of the river Chelt. I think the fencing is public not linked to a garden. Panel falling onto highway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Millbrook Street, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th April
item.description:
This rubbish appeared overnight. THIS IS THE THIRD TIME RUBBISH HAS BEEN DUMPED HERE SINCE TUESDAY. Last week we had 4 seperate dumps.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Pates Avenue, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: American flags hanging from lamp posts, 11th April
item.description:
Please remove the American flags (and other flags for that matter) from the lamp posts. They have been there for nearly 2 months. I presume it is not now legal for anyone to hang whatever flags they want from flag posts.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 122, Station Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rotting knee rails - falling to bits, 10th April
item.description:
Repair all the rotting knee rails in the area of the photos which have been rotting for some time now, they are falling bits and looking terrible. Have been informed that all of the knee rails identified in these areas fall under the responsibility of Tewksbury Borough Council as they adopted the open spaces in these areas in 2025.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tiger Moth Close, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden knee rails rotting and falling to bits, 10th April
item.description:
Repair all the rotting knee rails in the area of the photos which have been rotting for some time now, they are falling bits and looking terrible. Have been informed that all of the knee rails identified in these areas fall under the responsibility of Tewksbury Borough Council as they adopted the open spaces in these areas in 2025.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Guan Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
